questions.question: In the following question, select the odd letters from the given alternatives.
questions.explanation: All the rest except option (c) follows following pattern: O+2=Q Reverse alphabet of Q = J Followed by, Q+2=S S+2=U Reverse alphabet of U = F It becomes OJSF

questions.question: In the following question, select the odd number pair from the given alternatives.
In the following question, correct the equation by interchanging two signs. 19 X 10 - 18 ÷ 60 + 20 = 36
questions.explanation: On interchanging X and - signs we get, LHS = 19 - 10 X 18 ÷ 60 + 20 = 19 - 3 + 20 = 36

questions.question: If 70 - 2 & 42 = 56 and 59 - 1 & 12 = 35, then in the expression 66 - A & 51 = 228, what is the value of 'A'?
questions.explanation: The logic followed here is, For 66 - A & 51 = 228 Following mathematical operation is done: Step I: 66*A = 66A Step II: 66A - 51*2 = 228 Hence, A = 5

questions.question: Six people took different times to solve a question. K was the first one to solve the question. O solved it after L but, before M. P solved it immediately before N. Only one person solved it before O but, after N. Who took the maximum time to solve the question?
questions.explanation: →K was first to solve so, K took the least time. We get, __ > __ >__ > __ >__ > K Now, → P solved it immediately before N. → Only one person solved it before O but, after N. So, according to the time taken, N took more time than P. So, N > P And, we get, O > __ > N > P We have two possible cases now: O > __ >N > P >__ > K Or __ > O >__ > N >P > K It is given that, → O solved it after L but, before M. So, timings are, M > O > L So, case I becomes invalid and, We get the final arrangement as follows: M > O >L > N >P > K Thus, M took maximum time to solve it.

questions.question: Select the missing number from the given options. ![](https://u1.oliveboard.in/exams/solution/oliveimg/89662/image002.jpg)
If '+' is represented by 'x', '-' is represented by '÷', 'x' is represented by '-' and '÷' is represented by '+', then what will be the value of 12-5x676+13÷52?
questions.explanation: Generally when we write '+' means '÷', and expression is '6 + 4', it would mean '6 ÷ 4'. When we are writing '+' is represented by '÷', it means that when there is '÷' in the expression, it is representing '+' and so '6 ÷ 4' becomes '6 + 4'. The given expression becomes 12 x 5 + 676 ÷ 13 - 52 => 60+52-52 = 60

questions.question: Some fans are crazy. All fans are loyal. Some hooligans are fans. Conclusion I : All hooligans are crazy. Conclusion II: Some crazy are fans. Conclusion III: All loyal are crazy. Conclusion IV : Some hooligans are crazy.
questions.explanation: ![](https://u1.oliveboard.in/exams/solution/oliveimg/94250/image011.jpg) From the above venn diagram we can say that only conclusion II is true.

questions.question: From the given alternative words, select the word which can be formed using the letters of the given word: "RETRENCHMENT"
questions.explanation: REACH has an 'A' which is not present in the given word. MENTOR has an 'O' which is not present in the given word. TREATMENT has an 'A' which is not present in the given word. Thus, none of the given three words can be formed from the letters of the given word.

questions.question: Pointing a girl in a album Radha says she is the only niece of my only sibling and granddaughter of my husband's mother-in-law. How is Radha related to that girl ?
questions.explanation: ![](https://u1.oliveboard.in/exams/solution/oliveimg/other/s6020.jpg) My husband's mother in law will be my mother and her grand daughter means she is my daughter.

questions.question: A word is represented by only one set of number is given in any one of the alternatives. The sets of number given in the alternatives are represented by two classes of alphabets as in two matrices given below. The column and rows of matrix I are numbered from 0 to 4 and that of matrix II are numbered from 5 to 9.A letter from these matrices can be represented first by its row and next by its column, e.g. W can be represented by 00,32,etc and N can be represented by 57,95,etc,similarly,you have to identify the set for the word WINK. MATRIX-I 01234 0WJMIL 1LIWMJ 2JWILM 3LMWJI 4IWJML MATRIX-II 56789 5STNKV 6NKTUS 7STKNU 8TKWUS 9NSTKU
questions.explanation: By verifying using 1ST option 21 22 57 40 W I N I By 2nd option 32 11 58 65 W I K N By 3rd option 00 34 77 86 W I K K By 4TH option 12 03 95 66 W I N K.
